creator: chadr@aspsys.com
text:
Aspen Systems Direct
Aspen Systems is based out of Wheat Ridge, CO and has been in business for over 30 years offering customizable rackmount servers and workstations featuring FreeBSD and other open source operating systems. We also provide custom turn-key High Performance Computing Clusters for government, universities, and corporations throughout the world. Please contact a sales engineer today at 1-888-227-1286 or visit our website at http://www.aspensystemsdirect.com for more information.
